encodings/xmlcharrefreplace_errors.name: xmlcharrefreplace_errors
encodings/xmlcharrefreplace_errors.description: Implements the 'xmlcharrefreplace' error handling (for encoding within text encoding only). The unencodable character is replaced by an appropriate XML/HTML numeric character reference, which is a decimal form of Unicode code point with format &#num; .
